color_profiles.name: Deep Siberian Amethyst
color_profiles.cause: High Fe4+ color center density; optimal iron content and irradiation history.

color_profiles.name: Standard Amethyst
color_profiles.cause: Fe4+ color centers at moderate concentration.

color_profiles.name: Ametrine
color_profiles.cause: Temperature and oxidation state gradient during crystal growth produces amethyst (cooler zones) and citrine (warmer/more oxidizing zones) in one crystal.

visual_notes: Amethyst geodes from Brazil and Uruguay are among the most recognizable mineral display specimens globally. Hollow cavite filled with violet crystals pointing inward. The finest deep Siberian-grade material shows a red flash under incandescent light. Color zoning in angular patterns is characteristic and diagnostic.

optical_effects.fluorescence: Typically none to very weak; some pale specimens show weak bluish or greenish fluorescence
